title: Crispy Fermented Olive Stir-fry
description: An adventurous greek dish featuring crispy fermented olives in a mediterranean-friendly stir-fry with warm water and tempering techniques.

ingredients.name: fermented olives
ingredients.notes: crispy, brined and fermented for 3 weeks or more

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together olive oil and minced garlic cloves. Heat the mixture over medium heat.
Add red pepper flakes to the heated mixture and stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Drain fermented olives well and add them into the pan with the garlic mixture. Stir gently to combine and coat olives evenly.
Slowly drizzle in warm water while constantly stirring, starting from the side of the pan opposite the heat source to prevent splattering.
Continue adding warm water gradually, using a spoon or spatula as needed to incorporate it into the olives without overworking them. Use temperer and salt to taste as you stir.
When all water is incorporated, remove from heat immediately. Serve hot with crusty bread for dipping.
